titleStmt.title: SII 27.372: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 372. (A.R. No. 552 of 1929-30.) UPPUNDA, COONDAPOOR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab (No. 2) set up in the prākāra of the Durgā-Paramēśvarī temple.

This damaged record registers a gift of land for the maintenance of the piper playing during the śrībali service in the temple of Durgā-Paramēśvarī at Uppugunda by Parasu-heggaḍe, nephew (? aḷiya) of Aṇṇasāvanta.
It is dated Śaka 1405, Śubhakṛit, [Kārttika śu. 5, Thursday], corresponding to 1482 A.D., October 17.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . śrī sarasvatyēṁ [namaḥ .]
śrī gurubhyōṁ namaḥ nirvvighghanamastu namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdra
cāravē trayilōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śakavaruṣa 1405 ne śubhakṛt saṁvatsara kārttika śu 5 gu
ruvāradaṁdu śrīmatu sakalaguṇa saṁpaṁnnarumappa
Aṁṇasāvaṁtara Aḷiya parasuheggaḍeya dharma
raṁtaru śrīdurggāparamēśvarige śrī
yōgaḍoḷu nāgasarake biṭṭa mūlaśilāśā
teṁdare nāu mūlavāgi Āḷuttaṁ vidda Uppuguṁda
geṁbudu hā 60 lekkadalū mu 16 bāḷanu ba
ya Udakavanu Uppuguṁḍada nāḍa
hadakke Ā ṟanu nāḍu samastaru taṁma bidabāḷa
yi bāḷanu sarvamānyavāgi bijaūra durggādēvige dēvasakke biṭṭa
rkallina hoḷeya Udakavanu naṁma nāḍige koḍada saṁmaṁda
ru samastaru samastaru naṁma naṁma nāḍela sta neṟa
mastarū mūlavāgi koṭṭadu mūlavāgi Āḷuttaṁ vidda
dēviya magisina bāḷiṁ teṁkalu ṁcina tārabaya bēli
togareya beṭṭigāṟana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu hāḍe gaḍiyiṁda
mūḍalu baḍagalu dēviya dēvasva rācakava koṭṭiyaṇaseṭṭiya bāḷiṁda teṁkalu yiṁtī catusī
meyiṁda voḷaguḷa bāḷu hāne 60 lekkadalū mu 16 Akṣaradalū hadināṟu muḍi gadeyanu
durggāparamēśvarige śrībaliya viniyōgadoḷu nāgasarake bi 4 ke Udakadhā
rā pūrvvakavāgi Ā caṁdrākkastāyiyāgi naṁma satisuta
durggāparamēśvarige mūladhāreyaneṟadu koṭṭeU yi bāḷige teṟa
ṭṭi biḍāra Ese Apaṇe muṁtāda Enuluḷḷudanū sarvvamānyavāgi
yiṁtappudakke sākṣigaḷu . vīraṁṇa Aḍaha sāḷu heggaḍe
dhaṁmaseṭṭi bemmakaṁbaḷi rājakana koṭṭiyaṇaseṭṭi taṁgiyakka
davoppa kānabrahmaru nāḍu samastara voppa durggādēvi . dānapālanayōrma
dhyēdānāśrēyōnu pālanaṁ . dānātsarggamavāpnōti pālanādaccutaṁ
sāsanakke Ārobaru Aḷupidare vāraṇāsiya(siya) sāvira
kavileya koṁda dōṣakke hōharu yiṁtivarubhayānumatadiṁda kūra Ā
yayigara hebāranamaga sōmanātha A tōḍana baraha
12 Amṛtapaḍige mu 4 ya kaṭṭipaḍiya hoyivaru śubhamastu .
Digital edition of SII 27.372 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
